---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# create directories

dir.create("../xlsx", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../xlsx/test", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../xlsx/test/dem", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/test/prf", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/test/mon", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/test/sec", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
```


```{r}
# h26 age
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000140356.xlsx

# h27 age
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177242.xlsx

# h28
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347712.xlsx

# h29 
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711834.xlsx

# h30
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539670.xlsx

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821449.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262144.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122096.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258296.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493092.xlsx

url_dem <- c("https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000140356.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177242.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347712.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711834.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539670.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821449.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262144.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122096.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258296.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493092.xlsx")
```

```{r}
file_dem <- url_dem %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_dem <- paste0("../xlsx/test/dem/", file_dem)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_dem)){
  download.file(url_dem[i], path_dem[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_dem[i], "downloaded"))
}
```


```{r}
# h26 pref
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000171424.xlsx

# h27 pref
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177244.xlsx

# h28
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347713.xlsx

# h29
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711837.xlsx

# h30
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539671.xlsx

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821450.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262145.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122097.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258315.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493093.xlsx

url_prf <- c(
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000171424.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177244.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347713.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711837.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539671.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821450.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262145.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122097.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258315.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493093.xlsx"
)
```

```{r}
file_prf <- url_prf %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_prf <- paste0("../xlsx/test/prf/", file_prf)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_prf)){
  download.file(url_prf[i], path_prf[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_prf[i], "downloaded"))
}
```

```{r}
# monthly

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000825122.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262147.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122098.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258316.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493095.xlsx


url_mon <- c(
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000825122.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262147.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122098.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258316.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493095.xlsx")

```

```{r}
file_mon <- url_mon %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_mon <- paste0("../xlsx/test/mon/", file_mon)
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_mon)){
  download.file(url_mon[i], path_mon[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_mon[i], "downloaded"))
}
```

```{r}
# secondary

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821451.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262151.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122099.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258317.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493098.xlsx

url_sec <- c("https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821451.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262151.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122099.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258317.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493098.xlsx"
)
```

```{r}
file_sec <- url_sec %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_sec <- paste0("../xlsx/test/sec/", file_sec)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_sec)){
  download.file(url_sec[i], path_sec[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_sec[i], "downloaded"))
}
```
